prompt:
# T-147 — Variants/Modules modals browser parity

PRD: docs/prd/02-Settings-PRD.md
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/modals.jsx:72-108,262-375
Parent tasks: T-048, T-051

## Goal
Playwright screenshot parity + axe-violations check for all 2 screens/modals in this group against the settings prototype. 0 critical/serious axe violations on each screen.

## Screens in scope
FlagEditModal, PromoteToL2Modal

## Implementation contract
- Playwright spec at apps/web/e2e/settings/b-modals-parity.spec.ts
- Seeds appropriate fixture data for each screen
- Visits each screen/modal URL, captures full-page screenshot vs prototype region
- Runs axe-core on each view; asserts 0 critical and 0 serious violations
- Attaches traces/screenshots per _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md

## Files in scope
- apps/web/e2e/settings/b-modals-parity.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/settings/fixtures/b-modals-seed.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Playwright runs the parity spec for each screen, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/modals.jsx:72-108,262-375, then screenshots match within tolerance per _meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md
2. Given each screen is mounted, when axe-core runs, then 0 critical and 0 serious violations
3. Closeout attaches Playwright traces/screenshots OR documents blocker + RTL/snapshot fallback

## Risk red lines
- Do not modify implementation code
- Do not relax axe threshold
- Do not run against shared/staging DB
